description: From the Publisher The Perfect Gift for the Season! This holiday, give a gift that means more than anything you can buy off the shelf. The Story of Mum & Dad is a keepsake journal that helps parents reflect on their journey—from childhood memories and first dates to family milestones and lasting love. Whether they fill it out together by the fire or one page at a time over tea, this book becomes a priceless treasure for generations to come. A thoughtful, heart-warming gift for: - Parents celebrating decades together - New parents sharing their story - Adult children honoring Mum & Dad’s love Wrap up their story this season—and give the gift of memories that never fade. Every Mum Has a Story Worth Remembering From her childhood dreams to her proudest moments, Mum’s Story helps her reflect on a lifetime of love, laughter, and lessons worth sharing. Every Dad Has a Story to Tell Celebrate Dad’s journey—from boyhood adventures to fatherhood milestones—and capture the wisdom, humor, and memories that shaped who he is today. Together, Their Story Comes Full Circle The Story of Mum & Dad brings both voices together with heartfelt prompts about their love, marriage, and life as a couple—a keepsake for generations to cherish.
